message:
feat(cx): wire Macaroon tokens into Cx for capability attenuation (bd-2lqyk.2)

Integrates MacaroonToken into the Cx capability context:
- with_macaroon()/macaroon(): attach/read bearer tokens
- attenuate(predicate): add caveats without root key (decentralized)
- verify_capability(root_key, ctx): HMAC chain + caveat evaluation
- Evidence emission for verification success/failure
- Token propagates through clone, restrict, and retype

12 integration tests covering attach, clone, restrict, attenuate,
verify (success/failure/caveats), chained attenuation, and evidence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
